---
title: "Vincenzo Palazeti"
image: images/me.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vicenzo-palazeti/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/vinnie-palazeti
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:vinnie.palazeti@indystats.com
---

### hi there!

<p class="topbr">I'm Vinnie. </p>

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### education

<div class="topbr">
<p class="custom-subtitle">`r fontawesome::fa("graduation-cap", fill = "#98A08D", a11y = "sem")` **MS in Applied Statistics, 2020**</p>
<p class="custom-subtitle2">University of Loyola Chicago</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle">`r fontawesome::fa("graduation-cap", fill = "#98A08D", a11y = "sem")` **BS in Professional Selling, 2017**</p>
<p class="custom-subtitle2">Ball State University</p>
</div>


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### experience

put experience here!
